dependency_context_notes: References feature flag and observable source assets, but no file paths or specific component names provided
behavioral_specificity_notes: Shows before/after screenshot but doesn't specify exact terminology changes or all affected UI surfaces

PRESENT: High-level problem: UI says 'materialize' for non-materializable assets
Test evidence: manual testing with feature flags
Scope hint: Observe UI, observable source assets
PARTIALLY_PRESENT: Acceptance criteria: screenshot shows desired state but no explicit pass/fail rules
Scope: mentions feature flag but unclear if changes apply in all feature flag states
Dependency context: references 'faceted nodes feature flag' and 'observable assets' but no code locations
ABSENT: Complete list of affected UI components/surfaces
Whether changes affect asset filtering, sorting, or other downstream behavior
